prerequisites.value: Mesmerist level 11th, painful stare class feature, blind.

description.value: **Benefit:** Whenever you use your painful stare, the target must succeed at a Will saving throw (DC = 10 + half your mesmerist level + your Charisma modifier) or become confused for 1 round. Whether or not the save is successful, a creature cannot be affected by this ability again for 24 hours.
